generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance PowerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Power sensor measuring input power to heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerDataTransmitted
]

instance PolystyreneBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Polystyrene styrofoam box with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs for 4A current control and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising polystyrene box, heatbed, fan, temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi controller, PCB, and power supply"
    base:contains PolystyreneBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4Controller, PCB, PowerSupply, DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3, PowerSensor
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationService, ModelCalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code implementation and reproducibility"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinEvolutionService
]

instance OneWireCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for DS18S20 sensor connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationService, ModelCalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3
]

instance PowerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary, ThermalModelA, ThermalModelB
]

instance PowerInputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power input data for heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary, ThermalModelA, ThermalModelB
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter thermal model for air-room energy balance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation models for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring using upper/lower temperature limits (UL/LL) to ensure operational safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, BangBangControllerAction
]

instance TwinEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model development, experimental calibration, and validation using real-world data; open-source implementation for reproducibility and future enhancements"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDevelopmentInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature dynamics from thermal simulation models"
]

instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters informing control decisions"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when temperature exceeds upper/lower limits"
]

instance BangBangControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang controller using UL/LL thresholds to regulate heating cycles"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelDevelopmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from twin evolution process for model development and calibration"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs handling 4A current"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan operation are sent from the DT controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ, which then drives the actuators through the PCB's MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Components include RabbitMQ broker, Raspberry Pi controller, low-level driver, simulation models (Model A/B), with data flow via RabbitMQ between physical components and virtual models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models into the deployed physical system for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature) tested via sensor placement experiments, model calibration minimizing residual error via least squares, and validation against experimental data showing sensor discrepancies (up to 7°C)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for inter-component communication, 1-Wire bus for sensor data, GPIO pins for hardware control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server running locally."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver, optocouplers for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators, and temperature limits (UL/LL) to prevent unsafe operation."
]
